programs.title: The Promise
programs.desc: An Armenian man struggles to keep his family and loved ones safe from genocide by the Turkish army during WWI.

programs.title: Never Back Down
programs.desc: A rebellious teen starts at a new school, where he becomes caught up in the underground fight scene.

programs.title: The Arrival
programs.desc: Zane, an astronomer, discovers intelligent alien life. But the aliens are keeping a deadly secret.

programs.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programs.desc: An American teen joins up with a band of martial arts warriors in order to free the imprisoned Monkey King.

programs.title: The Giver
programs.desc: In a seemingly perfect community, a boy is chosen to learn about the pain and pleasure of the "real" world.

programs.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programs.desc: A small-time rancher agrees to hold a captured outlaw who's awaiting a train to go to court in Yuma.
